titleStmt.title: SII 20.191: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 191. (B.K. No. 25 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the Taluk Office.

summary.p: This damaged and worn out record is dated in the cyclic year Yuva, Āshāḍha, Amāvāsyā, Monday, Pushya-nakshatra. In the reign of Siṅghaṇa, Yuva fell in A.D. 1215 and in that year the tithi corresponded to June 28 which was a Sunday and not Monday. Pushya-nakshatra coincided with the latter day.

The inscription records a gift of oil for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of god [Kēdāra]dēva, by the oil men of Purikaranagara. It appears that Māyi-paṇḍita was administering Purikaranagara at the time as a subordinate of the king.
The writer of the inscription was a son of Rudrabhaṭṭōpādhyāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīmatprathvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
śvaraṁ gūrjjaravāraṇāṁkuśaṁ teluṁgaśiraśchēdakaṁ yādavacakravartiyumappa śrīmatsiṁ
haṇadēvana rājyamuttarōttarapravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamireyire . tatpra
tāpameṁteṁdoḍe . madavanmātaṁgasaṁdōhamananupamasiṁdhujāśvāḷiyaṁ sammadadiṁ ndaṁ dibyavastupra
karamananiśaṁ muṁdittaṁdittu rakṣippudenuttaṁcōḷacēḷādyakhiḷanṛpakuḷaṁ siṁhaṇō rvvīśana śrīpadapaṁkējātayu
gmakkeṟagi bardukuguṁ daltadīyājñeyiṁda . nijahastāyattakhaḷga vidaḷa nānāśapha janā
dyajjayagōminī suvanitāprōtsāhadaṁtā śrīyo nurvvīvaḷa yā
bhāsvadyaśōrajanīśaṁ varayādavānvayabhava śrīsiṁhaṇō [.] tatpāda padmōpajīvi māyipa
ṇḍitara pratāpameṁteṁdoḍe . siṁhaṇacakravarttiya
sudhēśamataṁgajarājirādhanāda hari saṁtataṁ dharaṇiyoḷa nādaṁ hṛdayaṁga mavinu
ta maṁtriguṇōṁnata māyipaṁḍitaṁ . Ā māyi sthiramumanēkādhi
ṣṭhitaṁ māḍi duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁ vudu kuṁtaḷadēśaṁ matta
daṟoḷesedu tōrppudu ni purikaranagaraṁ . mattamalli . ©
śrīmanmēnātmajātātatanutanaya ta lasatpādapaṁkējayu
gmaṁ bhūmistutyaṁ svayaṁbhūttamanavanataka purikaranagarā
dhīśanudyanmahēśaṁ . mattamā dēvana sthānācāryya puṣṭakuḷalī
lāvāsavikhyātacūtavanaṁ bhūnutakīrttibhā manāthaviḷasa
tsthānōttamācāryyanāryyavinūtaṁ dhareyo . mattamā sthā
nadoḷ kṣētranivāsigaḷuṁ jaṭābhirāmavēṣigaḷuṁ caṁḍakarāḷa Akaḷaṁka tapastējaḥpra
tapitāṁgajanudāttaguṇagaṇaniḷayaṁ lakuḷī nesedaṁ jagadi .
tatsutaruṁ tapōniṣṇātarumappa mūṟujāvi dhārāpūrvakaṁ mā
ḍi yuvasaṁvatsarada Āṣāḍhadamāvāsye sōmavāra puṣyanakṣatra byatīpāta doḷ tadarādhyaruṁ jagadārādhya
rumappa śrīmatkēdāradēvara naṁdādīvigegaṁ nityanaimittika pura da telligarayvattokka
lugaḷu nirbhbharabhaktiyiṁ Ā puraṁgaḷa gāṇaṁgaḷoḷoṁdu soṁṭige yeṇneyaṁ pratidinamācaṁdrārkkatā
raṁ koṭṭaru maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānācchrēyōnu pālanaṁ dānātsvarggama
vāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . śāsanamidāvudelliya śāsanavārittarēke salisu veniṁtī śāsanama
neṁba pātakanā sakaḷaṁ rauvarakke gaḷagaḷaniḷiguṁ śrīmadrudrabhaṭṭōpādhyāya sūmanā likhitaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 20.191 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
